commands.show configuration effective:
ap-group "LAB-AP"
    virtual-ap "guest-vap"
!
wlan virtual-ap "guest-vap"
    ssid-profile "guest-ssid-profile"
    aaa-profile "guest-aaa"
    vlan 30
    forward-mode tunnel
!
wlan ssid-profile "guest-ssid-profile"
    essid "GUEST-LAB"
    opmode opensystem
!
aaa profile "guest-aaa"
    initial-role "guest-logon"
    mac-default-role "guest-logon"
!
user-role "guest-logon"
    access-list session "guest-logon"
!
interface vlan 30
    ip address 192.0.2.30 255.255.255.0
!
ip access-list session "guest-logon"
    user any svc-dhcp permit
    user any svc-dns permit
    user alias controller svc-https dst-nat 8081
!
netdestination "controller"
    host 192.0.2.1
!
commands.show user-table:
Users
-----
192.0.2.101 aa:bb:cc:00:00:01 guest-user-1 role guest-logon vlan 30 essid GUEST-LAB
commands.show rights guest-logon:
Derived Role = guest-logon
guest-logon
    user any svc-dhcp permit
    user any svc-dns permit
    user alias controller svc-https dst-nat 8081
